title: Performance problems after launch
selftext: The game keeps crashing and the frame rate stutters badly, but I still hope the next patch can fix the biggest issues.

title: Missing promised features
selftext: Marketing promised a deeper city and the trailers set very high standards. The missing systems are disappointing.

title: Patch roadmap gives me hope
selftext: The launch was buggy and unfinished, but the roadmap makes me hopeful that the game can improve.

title: Crashes and missing systems
selftext: There are crashes and missing features compared with the reveal. This does not feel like the promised game.

title: Potential after updates
selftext: The game has problems, but there is potential if future updates add more systems and fix the biggest issues.

title: Foundation update discussion
selftext: The update is promising and some problems are fixed, but the original advertising still shaped expectations.

title: PC stutter is frustrating
selftext: The PC version has stutter and frame drops. It is still fun, but the performance problem needs a patch.

title: Great game despite technical issues
selftext: There are technical issues, but the game is amazing and I hope support continues.

title: Servers keep breaking
selftext: The servers crash and the app freezes, but the launch hype is huge and people still love the concept.

title: Updates needed quickly
selftext: Tracking is broken and players are disappointed. Hopefully the next update brings stability.

title: Minor glitches but strong launch
selftext: A few glitches appeared, but the game is stable and the community seems excited after release.

title: Frame drops in busy areas
selftext: There are frame drops and a few issues, but the game is great and players seem willing to defend it.
